name: Siteminder Limited
analysis: SDR has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 49% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (1.7× the 20-day average) — real participation. Price has broken above the base high at A$4.0400. Trade idea: entry A$4.0500, stop A$3.3759, target A$6.1700 (3.14:1) — then trail it.
